note: PR Freelance pipeline scrape May 9-12, 2026. 7 fresh leads, all 75+ combined. Mix of HIGH-INTENT operating-company funding events (Reserv $125M KKR Series C 5/4, Kin Insurance $335M cat bond 5/8, General Fusion–SVAC de-SPAC closing mid-2026) and AGENCY-OVERFLOW targets (Crackle PR actively interviewing senior freelancers, Edelman Smithfield, Gregory FCA/BackBay integrated practice, Serotonin's 149 open roles). Crackle PR is the headline because they have an explicit, open public posting that they are interviewing senior B2B tech freelancers/consultants able to lead accounts — that's directly Mark's profile. No duplicates of pr-freelance-scrape-2026-04-30 through 2026-05-08, daily-scrape leads, or legal-freelance-scrape-2026-05-12. Job-board postings sourced via web search of Google/Bing indexed results — no LinkedIn bot scraping.

leads.name: Crackle PR

leads.compensationText: Open — discussed during initial conversation. Senior-led shop, all-senior strategist team
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Freelance / Consultant — accounts lead capacity (explicit posting)
leads.notes: HEADLINE LEAD. Crackle PR is publicly and actively interviewing 'B2B tech freelancers & consultants who have proven ability to lead accounts.' Senior-led, fully remote, 20+ all-senior strategist boutique focused on VC-backed B2B tech and fintech (Series A through IPO). Pricing transparency, GEO/LLM-optimized practice. This is the cleanest fit-and-intent match in this scrape — Mark's profile (senior, plug-in-fast, hourly/retainer/project flexibility) lines up with the explicit need. ACTION: Direct outreach to Parry Headrick via LinkedIn; cite specific senior-led B2B tech accounts handled, GEO familiarity, and ability to lead-not-support. Expect rapid response cycle given active interview pipeline.

leads.name: Kin Insurance

National expansion narrative is forming and ION Analytics has Kin targeting 2025 IPO filing with 2026 listing. This is the sweet spot for fractional IR-PR support: capital-markets-style narrative, cat-bond investor comms, national expansion thought leadership, and CEO Sean Harper executive comms — all on a tight pre-IPO window. ACTION: Cold outreach to Harper + Lucas Ward through LinkedIn citing: (1) cat-bond comms experience analog, (2) pre-IPO narrative coaching, (3) ability to plug in immediately on a fractional basis for the 6-9 month listing window. Strong likelihood of needing external comms muscle as in-house team scales.

leads.notes: Top Web3 GTM firm with active hiring pipeline — 149 open roles as of April 2026 spanning PR Manager, PR Associate, Design Contractor, and AI & GTM Engineer. The Design Contractor listing alone confirms they operationally hire on a contract basis, which makes a PR contractor pitch viable. Mark's crypto-adjacency (Tether, Crypto.com, Offchain Labs, Coinbase pursuits captured in prior scrapes) gives him case-study credibility. ACTION: Send Amanda Cassatt a brief note positioning availability for senior PR/comms contract or fractional support — emphasize traditional-finance + crypto crossover narrative (regulator-friendly, institutional crypto, RWA), which is where Web3 buyers most need adult comms. Apply via careers@serotonin.co with senior consultant framing rather than employee track.

The scaling narrative + KKR involvement creates urgent thought-leadership and trade-press demand: industry talk-tracks for The Insurer, Insurance Business, Carrier Management, Digital Insurance, plus B2B narrative for partner channels. ACTION: Cold outreach to CJ Przybyl positioning senior fractional/project support on (1) Series C victory-lap and KKR backstory, (2) AI-in-claims thought leadership program, (3) industry-event speaking calendar. Reserv's in-house comms muscle is unlikely to match the 4-year scale-up runway — external senior support is the obvious play.

leads.notes: Pre-listing de-SPAC window is the highest-margin moment to plug in: proxy comms, investor-day prep, sell-side narrative, first-time-public-company storytelling, and post-listing day-1 calendar all need senior orchestration. SVAC's recent F-4/A amendments and ongoing 425 communications filings in May 2026 confirm an active deal in late innings. First-publicly-traded-pure-play-fusion-company narrative is a once-in-a-decade reputation event. ACTION: Cold outreach to Twinney + Sorrells through LinkedIn + investor-relations channels. Pitch interim IR/investor-comms support through close + first 90 days post-listing. Be explicit about familiarity with de-SPAC mechanics (PIPE, redemption dynamics, earnout structures). Strong moment-in-time opportunity even though sector (deep tech) is slightly outside Mark's core financial-services ICP.
